footer.description: File encryption system that allows byte visualization, content modification, and secure data protection using strong algorithms.

home.title: EncryptPath
home.intro: This system allows you to upload files, visualize their bytes in ASCII and HEX format, encrypt them using a password, and later decrypt them. It also includes SHA-256 hash generation to verify integrity.
home.step1Desc: Click "Select file" to choose a file from your device.
home.step2Desc: Press the "Load" button to convert the file into bytes within the system.
home.step3Desc:
Go to the encryption section and enter a password.

You can use the ASCII and HEX tables to:
• Manually modify the file bytes
• Analyze how the information changes
• Understand the internal representation of the file
home.step4Desc: Press the encrypt button to transform the bytes using your password.
home.step5Desc: Download the encrypted file to store or share it.
home.step6Desc: Review the encrypted file and compare it with the original.
home.dstep1Desc: Load the previously downloaded encrypted file. If there is data loaded, clear it first.
home.dstep2Desc: Enter the same password used during encryption and press decrypt. If the password is correct, you will recover the original file.
home.dstep3Desc: Download the decrypted file to store or share it.
home.dstep4Desc: Review the decrypted file and compare it with the original.
home.hashDesc:
The hash generates a unique fingerprint of the file.

It is used to:
• Verify integrity
• Detect changes
• Compare files

You can modify a single byte of the file and you will see how the hash changes completely, demonstrating sensitivity even to minimal changes.

document.title: Select a file to load it into the system

encryptPage.title: File Encryption
encryptPage.description: Protect your file using secure password-based encryption
encryptPage.mustEncrypt: You must encrypt the file first

decryptPage.title: File Decryption
decryptPage.description: Recover the original content using the correct password
decryptPage.mustDecrypt: You must decrypt the file first

hashPage.title: SHA-256 Hash Generator
hashPage.description: Calculate a unique digital fingerprint to verify file integrity
